title: AngleEnd Property
description: Sets the end angle of the range in which ArcFinder finds circular objects.
notes: Specifies a range in which ArcFinder finds circular objects, or ArcInspector inspects circular objects. The range should be between AngleStart and AngleEnd.
see_also:
Objects

Applies To

Vision Objects: ArcFinder, ArcInspector
